TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Vladimir_Putin, title = Vladimir_Putin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vladimir_Putin} }

S.FORM: Vladimir Putin ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 10, Vladimir Putin, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Russia ta' misuw hya' ga Vladimir Putin, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Vladimir Putin ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 10, Vladimir Putin, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Russia ta' misuw hya' ga Vladimir Putin, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *la*imir putin rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *la*imir putin, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw rus~ɕs~ɕia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *la*imir putin, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
